title: Force Light
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{ForcePower

|name=Force light
|alternate=
|alignment=[[Light side of the Force/Legends|Light side of the Force]]<ref name="POTJ">''[[Power of the Jedi Sourcebook]]''</ref>
|area=[[Alter]]<ref name="POTJ" />
|purpose=*Dispelling dark side energies and powers<ref name="POTJ" />
*Burning<ref name="Dark Empire 6">[[Dark Empire 6|''Dark Empire'' 6]]</ref> and harming dark side users<ref name="POTJ" />
*Exorcising<ref name="BWOO2" /> or destroying dark side Force ghosts<ref name="POTJ" />
|inventor=
|affiliation=[[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]<ref name="POTJ" />
}}
{{Quote|I rest in the ''lightside'' of the Force…''that'' is my power…|Nomi Sunrider|<ref name="DLOTS6">[[Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith 6|''Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith'' 6]]</ref>}}
'''Force light''' was a [[Light side of the Force/Legends|light side]] [[Force power/Legends|Force power]] used by the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]. When used against a [[darksider]], Force light would weaken the darksider's connection to [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. With the light of the Force, a Jedi could either purge or contain [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] manifestations or [[Vergence/Legends|nexus points]], whether in places, spirits, or even living persons, though sometimes to detrimental effect. By channeling the Force into withering blasts of light-side energy, the darkness can then be diminished or destroyed permanently. Force light could also be used to sever the bond between a [[Sith battlelord]] and their followers.

==History==
{{Quote|This place was powerful with the dark side…but my ''light'' is stronger.|Arca Jeth|<ref name="BWOO2">[[Tales of the Jedi 2|''Tales of the Jedi'' 2]]</ref>}}
[[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Yaddle/Legends|Yaddle]] was known to possess this ability, having learned it when studying [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Holocron/Legends|holocrons]] as head of the Librarian Assembly.<ref name="POTJ" /> [[Shae Koda]] used this power while battling the [[Saarl]] on [[Tython/Legends|Tython]]. The great Jedi Master [[Thon]] used an extreme application of this power to cleanse the entire [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Ambria/Legends|Ambria]] of the dark side, isolating the darkness in a [[Lake Natth|lake]].<ref name="Tales of the Jedi">[[Tales of the Jedi 3|''Tales of the Jedi'' 3]]</ref>

[[File:ArcaDispellsTheDark.jpg|thumb|left|295px|Arca Jeth dispels the darkness of Freedon Nadd's sarcophagus with Force light.]]
To end the [[Battle of Iziz]], Master [[Arca Jeth]] of [[Arkania/Legends|Arkania]] used this power to repel the darkness that was plaguing the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. Jeth was able to purge the dark side energies emanating from [[Freedon Nadd]]'s sarcophagus, the same energies [[Queen/Legends|Queen]] [[Amanoa]] drew power from for her [[Sith sorcery/Legends|Sith magic]]. Amanoa also perished as the darkness had finally been driven from her.<ref name="BWOO2" />

[[Nomi Sunrider]] was a master of Force light, having used it in conjunction with her [[Battle meditation/Legends|battle meditation]] to counter the Sith magic of [[Aleema Keto]] and dissolve her illusory constructs.<ref name="DLOTS6" />

While [[Mission to Ruusan|fighting]] the [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Jerec (Inquisitor)|Jerec]] in the [[Valley of the Jedi]] on [[Ruusan/Legends|Ruusan]], self-trained Jedi [[Kyle Katarn]], encouraged by the spirit of [[Qu Rahn/Legends|Qu Rahn]], turned his back to hate. Knowing that Jerec was too strong to fight, having harnessed the dark side energies of the [[Vergence/Legends|Force nexus]], Katarn created a shield of light around him to protect him from evil, and essentially weakening him from the powers he just harnessed.<ref name="Dark Forces: Jedi Knight">''[[Dark Forces: Jedi Knight]]''</ref><ref name="Dark Forces: Jedi Knight audio drama">[[Dark Forces: Jedi Knight (audio drama)|''Dark Forces: Jedi Knight'' audio drama]]</ref>

Leia Organa Solo released a pulse of light, burning Sidious's hand when he touched her after saying he would take over her unborn baby's body.<ref name="Dark Empire 6">[[Dark Empire 6|''Dark Empire'' 6]]</ref> [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Empatojayos Brand|Empatajayos Brand]] also wielded this power to bind the [[Force ghost/Legends|disembodied spirit]] of [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Galactic Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]]. Brand used the [[Light side of the Force/Legends|light side of the Force]] to shield [[Anakin Solo]] from Palpatine, effectively trapping the Emperor's spirit within Brand himself.<ref name="Empire's End">''[[Star Wars: Empire's End]]''</ref>

[[File:Force_Light.jpg|thumb|right|255px|Nomi Sunrider uses Force light to counter Aleema Keto's Sith magic.]]

[[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] used this power to defeat [[Onimi]], [[Supreme Overlord]] of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] at the end of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War|Vong War]], by achieving [[Oneness/Legends|Oneness]];<ref name="EGTTF">[[Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force (real-life book)|''Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force'']]</ref> a perfect state of harmony within the Force. Through his state of Oneness, the light produced by Solo purged the darkness of Onimi, killing him, and ending the Yuuzhan Vong conflict once and for all.<ref name="TUF">''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''</ref>

During his fight with [[Abeloth]] in the Fallanassi village, [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] drew in [[The Force/Legends|The Force]] as much as possible, his skin giving off a golden glow, and was able to repulse Abeloth who had him in a deadly embrace.<ref name="Vortex">''[[Fate of the Jedi: Vortex]]''</ref>

[[Ben Skywalker]] used this power against Abeloth during the [[Duel at the Font of Power]].<ref name="Apocalypse">''[[Fate of the Jedi: Apocalypse]]''</ref>

The [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Beldorion]] noted that three elite Jedi Masters, [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]], Thon and Nomi Sunrider, were prodigiously skilled in the Force, and were his prime examples to [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] of powerful Jedi that could direct the energies of the light side itself.<ref name="PoT">''[[Planet of Twilight]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
''Force light'' was a Force power first developed for the [[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]], found in the [[Power of the Jedi Sourcebook]].
